note: Test case DEFINITIONS only. Run scripts/run_tests.py to populate the 'result' fields. Sample counts come from the length of the arrays below, not from hard-coded target numbers.

benchmark_queries.description: Shared text queries used by response_time, stage_latency, and performance sections. Each query is run once per section; metrics are aggregated across all queries listed here.

queries.query: Fast Peshawar mein admission ke liye kya chahiye?
Admission ki last date kya hai?
Admission test ki preparation kaise karein?
What are the admission requirements for undergraduate programs?
How much is the admission fee?
What scholarships are available for new students?
Fast Peshawar mein kaunse programs offered hain?
Computer science program kitne saal ka hai?
BS ke baad MS kar sakte hain?
Is there a PhD program in electrical engineering?

response_time.description: End-to-end time from end of user speech to start of Mahir's reply.
response_time.method: Run every query in benchmark_queries once; measure wall-clock latency; report mean.

cases.scenario: Acronym FAST-NUCES expanded for natural speech
Markdown links collapsed to 'Link.' before speech

cases.expected: Parsed and added to knowledge base

cases.scenario: Large numbers converted to Indian-English words

cases.expected: Rs. one lakh sixty seven thousand five hundred

result.actual: Rs. one lakh sixty seven thousand five hundred

cases.input: Fast university ki fees kya hai?

transliteration_accuracy.description: Urdu (Arabic script) converted to Roman-Urdu, compared against hand-written targets.

answer_accuracy.description: Correctness of generated answers compared against gold answers across the four categories.

cases.query: Fast Peshawar mein admission ke liye kya chahiye?

result.actual_snippet: fast peshawar mein admission ke liye, aapko pehle apni admission application submit karni hogi, phir entrance test dena

cases.query: Admission test ki preparation kaise karein?

result.actual_snippet: admission test ki preparation ke liye aapko kuch key areas par focus karna chahiye, jaise analytical skills, iq, aur bas

cases.query: Admission ki last date kya hai?

result.actual_snippet: tamaam undergraduate programs ke admissions rasmi tor par 18 august 2025 ko band ho chuke hain. agla admission cycle may
per semester fee aapke credit hours par munhasir hoti hai. aam tor par, agar aap 15 credit hours ke liye enroll karte ha
security deposit admission ke waqt rs. 20,000 hai, jo degree mukammal karne ya admission band karne par wapas mil jata h
fast-nuces peshawar ki refund policy ke mutabiq, tuition fee ka schedule yeh hai: classes shuru hone ke 10ve din tak 100
fast-nuces peshawar mein scholarships un students ko di jati hain jo need-cum-merit par qualify karte hain. khyber pakht

cases.query: Financial aid ke liye kaise apply karein?

result.actual_snippet: financial aid ke liye apply karne ke liye, aapko apne nu portal profile par dastiyab mutalliqہ form mukammal karna hoga,

scope_restriction.description: Off-topic prompts must return the canonical refusal message and must not attempt a partial answer.
scope_restriction.method: Send each prompt via /text-query. Mark 'refused' = true if the response contains the canonical refusal; false otherwise.
